title: OWID Annual Electricity — Dual Metric Deceptive Drift Analysis v2.0
supersedes: OWID-DRIFT-001 (v1.0 used L2 norm mislabeled as TV)
purpose: Forward signal triad domain 2b: annual electricity with corrected metric naming and dual comparison.
data_source: Our World in Data energy dataset (based on Energy Institute + EMBER)

methodology_correction.v1_error: v1.0 defined 'tv' as L2 norm — not total variation distance.
methodology_correction.v2_correction: Renamed to 'l2_drift'. Added proper tv_distance = 0.5 * L1 norm.

methodology.carrier: Annual electricity generation by 9 fuel types, normalized to proportions
methodology.l2_drift: L2 norm (Euclidean distance) of proportion differences year-over-year
methodology.tv_distance: Total variation distance = 0.5 * L1 norm of proportion differences
methodology.drift_criterion: K_eff falling 2 consecutive years AND velocity metric below series median
